auditBaseline.source: fresh read-only audit baseline provided by owner

localDiscoveryRecount.script: provided simple src/app no-limit/no-range file script
localDiscoveryRecount.note: Simple text recount includes additional local matches/false-positive non-query files; no src/app runtime query files were changed in this wave.

classificationMatrix.reason: Reads are scoped to one subcontract/request/progress/log chain or ID sets derived from that parent; capping would break contractor detail/material completeness.
Reference dictionaries and app option caches need complete option sets; not a high-volume user list/search window.
Proposal item/accounting/view reads are proposal-scoped detail reads; capping would hide proposal rows.
Main director pending-row fallback still loads a complete list; safe pagination requires explicit UI/load-more state before reducing.
Incoming ledger report aggregation and incoming detail line reads must preserve full selected-range/parent completeness.
The remaining select is an insert-returning single-row job enqueue shape; job claim semantics are RPC-owned and were not changed.
Guard reads are chunked by caller-provided IDs and enforce FK/integrity behavior; adding pagination could weaken validation.
Runtime seed/setup fallback must read complete purchase/snapshot rows for one incoming document; not a list/search UI.
Proposal PDF source must preserve complete head, item, request, supplier, and app data.
PDF/document builder reads must preserve complete request/report model data.
Resolver reads are single-row parent/foreign-key lookups via maybeSingle; not a high-volume list/search window.

postWaveCount.note: No src/app runtime query files were changed, so the canonical audit baseline count remains unchanged for this classification-heavy partial.
